scripts.build:hostinger: BASE_PATH=/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/dosaji run build && cp -r artifacts/dosaji/dist/public/ artifacts/api-server/dist/public/ && cp -r artifacts/dosaji/dist/public/ ./public
scripts.deploy:hostinger: npx pnpm run build && npx pnpm run build:hostinger
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
